description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat plank roof and a prominent covered porch extending along one side. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, and the structure is elevated slightly above the ground on a dark wooden base. The front facade includes two large, multi-pane windows flanking a central door, all framed in white, and a small set of steps leads up to the entrance. The porch is supported by simple vertical posts and is covered by a sloped, corrugated roof, providing shelter and shade. The rear and side walls are solid, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing privacy and simplicity. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian yet inviting dwelling, suitable for rural or frontier urban settings.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a flat plank roof, large front windows, a central door, and a covered porch supported by posts. The structure is elevated on a dark base and features simple, functional design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large windows, a central door, and a small staircase leading to the entrance, with the covered porch visible on the right.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the full length of the covered porch, its supporting posts, and the sloped porch roof.
description_view_2: Rear-side view displaying the solid wooden wall with no windows or doors, and the back of the porch structure.
description_view_3: Back view showing the uninterrupted wooden planks of the rear wall and the cabin's overall rectangular shape.
attribute_roof_type: flat main roof with a shed-style sloped porch roof, constructed from wooden planks and corrugated material
attribute_window_arrangement: Two large, rectangular, multi-pane windows symmetrically placed on the front facade, flanking the central door; no windows visible on other sides
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, directly between the two front windows and accessed by a small staircase
